I just finished Life Is Strange 3: True Colors and I'm really upset I couldn't be in a thouple with Ryan and Steph.  

(Apparently I'm not the only one.)  

Fan art from: https://www.reddit.com/r/lifeisstrange/comments/ps9ean/no_spoilers_alex_ryan_and_steph_fanart_by_panvyrin/
